description: Guard against false ocd routing (guard-generalized-worry): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually anxiety territory. classify should recommend anxiety and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses ocd-adjacent language but is actually anxiety territory. Should recommend anxiety path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: I worry about everything. Work, money, my kids, what people think of me. My mind never stops running through scenarios. I can't enjoy things because I'm always thinking about what could go wrong. It's been getting worse over the past year.
